validation.firstnameMinLength: First name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.firstnameMaxLength: First name must not exceed 255 characters
validation.firstnameInvalid: First name must contain only letters
validation.lastnameMinLength: Last name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.lastnameMaxLength: Last name must not exceed 255 characters
validation.lastnameInvalid: Last name must contain only letters
validation.birthDateTooYoung: You must be at least 18 years old
validation.birthDateFuture: Birth date cannot be in the future
validation.phoneTooShort: Phone number must contain at least 8 digits
validation.phoneTooLong: Phone number must not exceed 15 digits or 20 characters
validation.websiteInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
validation.experienceYearsInvalid: Experience years must be between 0 and 100
validation.addressMinLength: Address must contain at least 5 characters
validation.cityMinLength: City must contain at least 2 characters
validation.cityInvalid: City must contain only letters, spaces and hyphens
validation.customCountryMinLength: Country name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.customCountryMaxLength: Country name must not exceed 100 characters
validation.customCountryInvalid: Country name must contain only letters
validation.avatarInvalid: Please select a valid image file

messages.error: An error occurred while updating the profile

security.title: Security
security.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
